subject: Physics
title: The Observer Effect
description: A fast breakdown of The Observer Effect for builders.

hook.text: Observing a quantum system changes it. The act of looking alters what you see.

buildup.text: To detect an electron, you must interact with it—shine light on it or bounce something off it.

discovery.text: That interaction transfers energy and changes the electron's state. You can't observe without disturbing.

twist.text: Many people confuse this with uncertainty, but they're different. Observation disturbs; uncertainty is deeper.

climax.text: The observer effect applies even to sophisticated experiments. Quantum stealth is impossible.

punchline.text: Look at a quantum particle and you've already changed it.

quiz.question: What is the observer effect in quantum mechanics?
options: Measuring a quantum system inevitably changes its state
Only human observers affect quantum outcomes
